acquisition method: Data collection on the Orbitrap Astral mass spectrometer was performed in a data-independent acquisition (DIA) mode of acquisition
alkylation reagent: alkylated with 20 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min at room temperature
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 20 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min at room temperature
cleavage agent: digested using 20 ng/µL sequencing grade trypsin (Promega) for 1 h at 47°C
collision energy: HCD collision energy setting of 27% was used for all MS2 scans
fragmentation method: HCD collision energy setting of 27% was used for all MS2 scans
instrument: Thermo Orbitrap Astral high-resolution accurate mass tandem mass spectrometer
labeling: qualitative proteomics was performed on one replicate of each RNA-containing pulldown sample
